deepseek-copilot.walkthrough.title: DeepSeek Models for GitHub Copilot Chat
deepseek-copilot.walkthrough.description: Set up DeepSeek models in GitHub Copilot Chat.
deepseek-copilot.walkthrough.setApiKey.d:
[Get an API key](command:deepseek-copilot.getApiKey) from platform.deepseek.com.
[Set API Key](command:deepseek-copilot.setApiKey)
Show DeepSeek models in the picker

Your DeepSeek models appear in the Copilot Chat model picker. If they are hidden, open the Language Models manager to show them.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
deepseek-copilot.walkthrough.chooseThink:
Each model exposes a **Thinking Effort** selector in the picker: `None`, `High`, or `Max`. Pick `Max` for hard coding, `None` for the fastest, cheapest responses.
[Open model picker](command:workbench.action.chat.modelPicker)
deepseek-copilot.config.title: DeepSeek Models for GitHub Copilot Chat
deepseek-copilot.config.baseUrl.descript: Override the DeepSeek API base URL. When set, this value is used verbatim. Defaults to `https://api.deepseek.com`. Use this for self-hosted proxies or compatible third-party endpoints.
deepseek-copilot.config.maxTokens.descri: Maximum number of output tokens per request. Set to `0` to use the API default (no explicit limit). Useful for controlling costs.
deepseek-copilot.config.maxRetries.descr: Maximum automatic retries for transient chat failures (HTTP 429 rate limits and 5xx server errors), not counting the initial attempt. Set to `0` to disable automatic retries and fail fast. Retries wait with exponential backoff and honor the server's `Retry-After` header.
deepseek-copilot.config.modelIdOverrides: Remap a built-in model's API id. Keys are the model id shown in the picker (e.g. `deepseek-v4-pro`); values are the id sent to the API. Use this for proxies that use different model names. To add brand-new models, use `customModels` instead.
deepseek-copilot.config.customModels.des: Add your own DeepSeek models to the picker. Each entry is either a model id string (e.g. `"deepseek-v4-pro"`) or an object such as `{ "id": "my-model", "name": "My Model", "maxInputTokens": 1000000 }`. Custom models always appear and are sent to the active endpoint.
deepseek-copilot.config.debugLogging.des: Enable verbose debug logging to the DeepSeek output channel. Use [`DeepSeek: Show Logs`](command:deepseek-copilot.showLogs) to view the channel. Logs may include request metadata but not prompt text.
deepseek-copilot.config.usageRefreshInte: How often (in minutes) to refresh the DeepSeek usage status bar. Minimum 1, maximum 1440 (24 hours). Shows your account balance from `GET /user/balance`.
deepseek-copilot.config.showUsageStatusB: Show the DeepSeek usage status-bar item. Displays your account balance from `GET /user/balance`.
